div.p: Inserting key K (hash=3, PSL=0) into table at 75% load factor

g.text: Step 3: Found Empty Slot — Place Entry

div.p: Inserting key X (hash=2, psl=0) — displacing shorter PSL

g.text: Step B4: Final Home for E

div.p: Entries with longer probe distances sit closer to their ideal slots. Minimizes variance of probe distances.

g.text: State: Slot 3 Occupied, PSL Too High

div.p: NO DISPLACEMENT Move to next slot. slot = 4 my_psl = 1
At Slot 4 metadata == EMPTY Place new entry!
At Slot 2 my_psl (0) > slot.psl (0)? NO, but equal PSL and X > C (Deterministic displacement)
Probing C Slot 3: D(3) > C(1) Slot 4: C(1) > E(0) DISPLACE E!
